name: Minyan Zayit
subtitle: Antizionist Minyan in Somerville
description: We are building a grassroots, anti-Zionist, traditional-egalitarian Jewish community in Somerville, Massachusetts. We dispute the hold of Zionism on contemporary Jewish identity, sustain movements by creating a spiritual home, and move a rich, anti-Zionist Judaism from the margins to the center of a living and thriving Jewish life.
